source_pr.title: executor: fix DATA RACE in TestParseSlowLogFile
source_pr.body:
<!--
Thank you for contributing to TiDB! Please read TiDB's [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/pingcap/community/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md) document **BEFORE** filing this PR.
-->

### What problem does this PR solve? <!--add issue link with summary if exists-->

Close #14866 

### What is changed and how it works?


`TestParseSlowLogFile` changes a global variable `variable.MaxOfMaxAllowedPacket`, so it should be stayed in `SerialSuite`.

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

 - Unit test

root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to concurrency races or unsynchronized shared state. Asynchronous state transitions need polling/Eventually-style checks. This PR stabilizes it by: executor: fix DATA RACE in TestParseSlowLogFile.
fix_pattern: executor: fix DATA RACE in TestParseSlowLogFile

evidence: evidence: PR title/body states DATA RACE; explains TestParseSlowLogFile changes global variable variable.MaxOfMaxAllowedPacket so should be in SerialSuite.
evidence: diff moves the global-variable-changing part into `testExecSerialSuite.TestParseSlowLogFileSerial` with comment "must be stayed in SerialSuite" (executor/slow_query_test.go).
